name: RPG - The parasite among us.
description:
Parasite POV / Parasite Persona highly recommended.

You can also use a monster POV/Persona if you want it can work too.

You will take the role of a parasite trying to survive and evolve in a threathening world. Choose your powers and abilities and prepare yourself to embark in a journey to find your place in this unkown world.

People will try to kill or capture you with all their might. You will have to adapt and create your own strategies to find your way in this Rp. As many Rp and as my last one a leveling system is here to help you, spread your influence and become an overwhelming threat to get stronger.

How will you handle the situations? How will you evolve?... It's up to you! But in this world, not only human will try to eliminate you. The world is set in a modern fantasy setting with magic and many species: Elves, Dwarves, Orcs, Half-beasts, Demons, Tieflings, etc...

As always this bot is an experiementation, please send reviews to improves the bot and give tips and advices.
creator: Bashk
